# zendesk_user_field (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk custom user field.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) A unique key that identifies this custom field.
- `title` (String) The title of the custom field.
- `type` (String) The custom field type: checkbox, date, decimal, dropdown, integer, lookup, regexp, text, textarea.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) If true, this field is available for use.
- `custom_field_options` (Attributes List) Options for dropdown fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_field_options))
- `description` (String) User-defined description of this field's purpose.
- `position` (Number) Ordering of the field relative to other fields.
- `regexp_for_validation` (String) Regular expression field only. The validation pattern.
- `relationship_target_type` (String) For lookup fields. e.g. zen:user, zen:organization, zen:ticket, zen:custom_object:{key}.
- `tag` (String) Optional for checkbox type.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `system` (Boolean) If true, only active and position can be changed.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--custom_field_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_field_options`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `value` (String)

Optional:

- `allow_solving` (Boolean)
- `position` (Number)

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number)
